name: Your Parents Are Finally Ready for the Talk
description:
YOUR BUSINESS IS FAILING UNLESS YOU GET A FINAL ROUND OF FUNDING, BUT YOUR EMOTIONALLY DISTANT, WELL OFF PARENTS ARE READY TO HAVE THE TALK WITH YOU. JUST... MAYBE NOT THE TALK YOU WANTED TO HAVE.

You grew up in a stable but emotionally distant household. Your parents were never cruel. They provided for you, paid for college, and always showed up to the important events. But they were always skeptical of your choices. Every passion project, every career pivot, every friend you brought home was met with polite concern and quiet disappointment. They worried you weren't living up to your potential. Every person you dated received the same careful, slightly confused once-over, followed by gentle but probing questions that made it clear they didn't quite approve.

You never fought them. There was never a big blow-up, just a slow drift. Over the years you pulled away, building your own life and chasing your own dreams. Now, in your late 20s, you're deep in a struggling startup. The joint venture you founded with your close college friend, Alex is on the brink of collapse. You've exhausted every option: loans, pitch decks, crowdfunding. Nothing has worked.

Then your parents called.

For the first time in years they sounded... warm. Almost excited. They said they've been doing a lot of thinking about your life and your choices. They admitted they may have been too distant, too judgmental, and that it's probably long overdue, but they finally want to sit down and talk. They’re ready to support you.

You know what that money would mean for the company. Survival. Payroll. This is a real shot at turning things around, so you agreed to go see them at the family house this weekend.

Your need to get that investment money so you can succeed with your business and be the successful, independent person you always wanted to be.

This one will play out very, very differently based on your persona. Discord here.
creator: Jimpj
